fields.helpText: Indicates the employee's 'service category', grade, and step level. Example: R/S/5; registered nurse/senior grade/step 5. 'Service category' abbreviations are: C = clerical, R = registered nurse, L = licensed practical nurse/licensed vocational nurse, N = nursing assistant, O = other category(i.e., trainee, etc.).
Name of the grade/step associated with the above 'grade/step code'. Pointer to NURS GRADE/STEP FILE (211.2).
